status.recipeName: Lemon Butter Orecchiette with Burrata and Roasted Pistachios
status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2-3 minutes (full); 45-90 second excerpt for short video

fields.title: Lemon Butter After Dark
fields.styleOfMusic: K-pop electronic pop with crisp four-on-the-floor kicks, rubbery synth bass, playful staccato percussion, bright glossy chorus, candy-sweet hook, sparkle FX, reversed bell swells, tiny glitch fill before each drop, clean punchy mix, wide neon sheen, close-mic lead vocals, sensual late-night food-video energy., k-pop, pop, electronic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive rap, no metal, no heavy rock, no children's choir, no advertising-style spoken voice, no voice-over narration, no real artist reference, no brand names, no recipe tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting, no explicit sexual lyrics, no cooking instructions.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics about a playful unicorn chef making lemon butter orecchiette with burrata and roasted pistachios. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, software names, or social media references.

Mood: glossy, sensual, joyful, late-night kitchen glow, creamy and crunchy food-video ASMR energy, seductive but clean.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hooks, occasional parenthetical echoes like "(lemon butter)" or "(orecchiette)". Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- lemon zest falling like yellow sparks
- brown butter turning amber and glossy
- orecchiette cups catching silky sauce
- burrata opening into white cream
- roasted pistachios and caper crumbs adding crunch
- basil, parmesan, black pepper, and a glowing final bowl
- a unicorn chef smiling over the finished dish

Must include naturally: orecchiette, burrata, lemon butter, pistachio, basil, golden crumbs, unicorn, creamy, crunchy.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Lemon zest, amber butter, warm kitchen glow.

[Pre-Chorus]
The sauce turns glossy; build anticipation around cream and crunch.

[Chorus]
Big chantable hook around lemon butter, orecchiette, burrata cream, pistachio crunch, and the unicorn's glowing bowl. Repeat "lemon butter" and "orecchiette" as hooks.

[Verse 2]
Pasta cups, basil, golden crumbs, black pepper sparkle.

[Bridge]
Softer creamy moment: burrata opens, everything gets lush and bright.

[Final Chorus]
Repeat the chorus with extra energy and a final creamy-crunchy image.
fields.shortVersionPlan: Use a tight intro from Verse 1 lemon zest and amber butter, jump into the pre-chorus as the sauce turns glossy, then take the full chorus over burrata rupture, pistachio crunch shower, fork lift, and final Licorn satisfaction. End on the repeated lemon butter / orecchiette hook.

instructions.voice: Bright close-mic lead with playful stacked harmonies; seductive food-pop energy without explicit lyrics.
instructions.structure: Make the chorus arrive early and repeat cleanly so a 45-90 second vertical excerpt can carry the final assembly sequence.
instructions.workflowNotes: Suno remains a manual workflow. Do not add music to Seedance prompts; Recipe2Video aligns the selected excerpt later.

qualityChecks: Title is first and matches the markdown field.
Style of Music is separate from Auto Lyrics Prompt.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is in English, under 3000 characters, and contains no tutorial quantities or numbered steps.
No real artists, protected voices, brands, or voice imitation requested.
Short version plan supports the burrata rupture, pistachio crunch, and final fork lift.
